skills.name: action-pattern
skills.description: The Action pattern encapsulates a single use case or business operation into an invokable class with injected dependencies for organized, testable logic.

skills.name: performance-optimization
skills.description: A high-performance coding skill focused on identifying bottlenecks, optimizing algorithms, and minimizing resource usage. It prioritizes profiling-driven refactoring, memory efficiency, and low-latency execution to maximize code throughput.
